name: cvat
desc: Computer Vision Annotation Tool (CVAT) is a leading platform for building high-quality visual datasets for vision AI. It offers open-source, cloud, and enterpr…
descFull: Computer Vision Annotation Tool (CVAT) is a leading platform for building high-quality visual datasets for vision AI. It offers open-source, cloud, and enterprise products, as well as labeling services, for image, video, and 3D annotation with AI-assisted labeling, quality assurance, team collaboration, analytics, and developer APIs.
